executable_notes: Document whether capture should target the launcher or the main game executable under Proton.
proton_notes: Track the exact Proton version and any RenderDoc compatibility notes observed during capture.
recommended_launch_options: Preserve any RADV or Fossilize environment overrides in the session notes.
Use a stable graphics preset label such as high_1440p or ultra_1440p_rt_off.
capture_notes: Capture the same scene state used to preserve the `.foz` files for Track B.
Save at least one screenshot that clearly identifies traffic, crowd density, and camera orientation.
